package rulecoverage

func NegativeSlowWorkInsideTransactionScope() string {
    ruleID := "slow_work_inside_transaction_scope"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Loop-heavy or slow work performed while a transaction appears open."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
